negative_cases.intent: zero/stub output implementation copied from starter must not satisfy the public behavior contract
Comparator Offset Search: shifts the decision threshold, preserving interface shape while reporting the wrong trip point.
Comparator Offset Search: uses the opposite event edge for the measurement latch, so the rising-ramp offset search is missed.
Comparator Offset Search: captures the trip point but never asserts the valid measurement output.
Comparator Offset Search: drives the decision and valid outputs but scales the reported offset metric too low.
